text.title: google-search-ads Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for google-search-ads as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Not reviewing the search terms report for the first 30 days of a new campaign.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: New BROAD and PHRASE campaigns accumulate irrelevant search terms quickly. Each unreviewed week is wasted budget on non-converting queries.
